name: edenred-pokeapi-cypress
description: API automation tests for PokeAPI using Cypress

scripts.test:ci:pr: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress run --env grepTags=@smoke --reporter junit --reporter-options "mochaFile=results/junit/pr-[hash].xml,toConsole=true"
scripts.test:ci:nightly: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& cypress run --env grepTags=@regression --reporter junit --reporter-options "mochaFile=results/junit/nightly-[hash].xml,toConsole=true"
